all.en: Every Sunday evening, the Lee family had a video call with relatives in Vancouver.
all.zh: 每個星期日晚上，李家都會和溫哥華的親戚視訊通話。

all.en: Grandpa, who was eighty years old, struggled to figure out the camera angle.
all.zh: 八十歲的爺爺努力想搞清楚鏡頭的角度。

all.en: "I can only see your forehead, Dad!" Aunt Linda shouted from the screen.
all.zh: 「爸，我只看得到你的額頭！」琳達阿姨在螢幕另一頭大喊。

all.en: Grandpa laughed and tilted the tablet up until his whole face appeared.
all.zh: 爺爺笑了，把平板往上斜，直到整張臉都出現在畫面裡。

all.en: Cousin Ryan, who was now twelve, showed off the snow falling outside his window.
all.zh: 已經十二歲的表弟雷恩展示著窗外飄下的雪。

all.en: His Taiwanese cousins gasped because they had never seen real snow before.
all.zh: 他在台灣的表兄弟姊妹都驚呼起來，因為他們從來沒看過真正的雪。

all.en: Aunt Linda announced that she was finally pregnant after years of trying.
all.zh: 琳達阿姨宣布在嘗試多年後，她終於懷孕了。

all.en: Everyone in Taiwan cheered, and Grandma started crying tears of happiness.
all.zh: 台灣這邊的所有人都歡呼起來，奶奶開心得流下眼淚。

all.en: They talked about plans to visit each other during the summer holidays.
all.zh: 他們聊著暑假時要互相拜訪的計畫。

all.en: Grandpa promised to bring his famous beef jerky when they flew to Canada.
all.zh: 爺爺答應飛去加拿大時要帶上他出名的牛肉乾。

all.en: The call lasted nearly two hours and felt much shorter than that.
all.zh: 視訊持續了快兩個小時，但感覺比實際時間短得多。

all.en: When they finally said goodbye, the distance between them felt much smaller.
all.zh: 當他們終於說再見時，彼此之間的距離感覺縮短了許多。

all.en: After hanging up, Grandma immediately started writing a long shopping list for the Canada trip.
all.zh: 掛掉電話後，奶奶立刻開始為加拿大之旅寫一張長長的購物清單。

all.en: She wanted to bring pineapple cakes, dried mangoes, and traditional Taiwanese tea bags.
all.zh: 她想帶鳳梨酥、芒果乾，還有傳統的台灣茶包。

all.en: Grandpa carefully sealed his homemade beef jerky in three layers of plastic bags.
all.zh: 爺爺仔細地把自製牛肉乾用三層塑膠袋封好。

all.en: The cousins in Taiwan started a group chat to plan activities for their Canadian relatives.
all.zh: 台灣的表兄弟姊妹開了一個群組，為加拿大親戚規劃活動。

all.en: They suggested visiting the night markets, hot springs, and a famous fishing village.
all.zh: 他們建議去夜市、泡溫泉，還有拜訪一個著名的漁村。

all.en: Aunt Linda replied with photos of baby clothes she had recently bought on sale.
all.zh: 琳達阿姨回覆了她最近特價買到的嬰兒衣服照片。

all.en: Ryan promised to teach his Taiwanese cousins how to build a proper snowman next winter.
all.zh: 雷恩答應明年冬天教他在台灣的表兄弟姊妹如何堆一個像樣的雪人。

all.en: Mom booked the flight tickets that same evening because the prices looked very reasonable.
all.zh: 媽媽當天晚上就訂了機票，因為價格看起來非常合理。

all.en: Grandpa kept practicing simple English phrases so he could chat with Ryan's school friends.
all.zh: 爺爺一直練習簡單的英語句子，這樣他就能和雷恩的同學聊天。

all.en: Everyone agreed that family love could easily cross any ocean, no matter how wide.
all.zh: 大家都認為，無論海洋有多寬，家人的愛都能輕易跨越。

all.en: The next morning, Grandma packed her suitcase with traditional snacks and a few handmade scarves.
all.zh: 隔天早上，奶奶把行李箱裝滿傳統零食和幾條手織圍巾。

all.en: Grandpa double-checked their passports and visa documents at the dining room table.
all.zh: 爺爺在餐桌前再次仔細檢查護照和簽證文件。

all.en: The Taiwanese cousins gathered at the airport to wave goodbye and take a final group photo.
all.zh: 台灣的表兄弟姊妹聚在機場揮手道別，並拍下最後一張合照。

all.en: During the long flight, Grandpa watched three movies and finally managed to take a short nap.
all.zh: 在漫長的飛行中，爺爺看了三部電影，最後終於小睡了一會兒。

all.en: When they landed in Vancouver, Aunt Linda was waiting with a homemade welcome sign.
all.zh: 當他們降落溫哥華時，琳達阿姨拿著一張自製的歡迎牌等待著。

all.en: Ryan ran into Grandpa's arms and immediately asked for the famous beef jerky.
all.zh: 雷恩衝進爺爺懷裡，立刻索取那有名的牛肉乾。

all.en: They drove through snowy streets, and Grandma marveled at the beautiful winter scenery outside.
all.zh: 他們開車穿過雪白的街道，奶奶讚嘆窗外美麗的冬日景色。

all.en: At dinner, Aunt Linda served homemade dumplings she had learned to make from her mother.
all.zh: 晚餐時，琳達阿姨端出她從母親那裡學來的手作水餃。

all.en: Grandpa shared stories from his youth, making everyone at the table laugh until tears came.
all.zh: 爺爺分享了他年輕時的故事，逗得餐桌上的人都笑出眼淚。

all.en: That night, the whole family fell asleep feeling deeply grateful for being together again.
all.zh: 那天晚上，全家人都帶著再次團聚的深深感激入睡。

all.en: A few days after arriving, Grandma surprised Aunt Linda with a beautiful handmade baby blanket.
all.zh: 抵達幾天後，奶奶用一條美麗的手工嬰兒毯給琳達阿姨一個驚喜。

all.en: She had secretly knitted the soft yellow blanket during her long flight across the Pacific.
all.zh: 她在橫越太平洋的漫長飛行中，偷偷編織了這條柔軟的黃色毯子。

all.en: Aunt Linda burst into happy tears and immediately placed it inside the new baby's nursery.
all.zh: 琳達阿姨開心地落下眼淚，立刻把它放進新生兒的嬰兒房裡。

all.en: Ryan took Grandpa to his local school and proudly introduced him to several curious classmates.
all.zh: 雷恩帶爺爺去他當地的學校，自豪地把他介紹給幾位好奇的同學。

all.en: Grandpa used his practiced English phrases and surprised everyone with his polite, gentle smile.
all.zh: 爺爺用他練習過的英語句子，以禮貌溫和的微笑讓大家驚喜不已。

all.en: That weekend, the whole family drove to a nearby mountain for sledding and snowball fights.
all.zh: 那個週末，全家開車到附近的山上玩雪橇和打雪仗。

all.en: Grandma had never touched real snow before, and she laughed like a young child outside.
all.zh: 奶奶以前從未摸過真正的雪，她在戶外像個小孩一樣笑著。

all.en: Grandpa built a small snowman with Ryan and gave it a colorful Taiwanese tea bag as a scarf.
all.zh: 爺爺和雷恩一起堆了一個小雪人，並用一個彩色台灣茶包當圍巾。

all.en: In the evening, they video called the Taiwanese cousins to share photos of their snowy day.
all.zh: 傍晚時，他們和台灣的表兄弟姊妹視訊通話，分享當天雪地的照片。

all.en: Everyone agreed this Canadian visit had become their most unforgettable family memory ever.
all.zh: 大家一致認為，這次加拿大之旅已成為他們最難忘的家庭回憶。
